headline: Billionaire Investor Takes New Stake In Thermo Fisher Scientific
summary: Hedge fund billionaire Daniel Loeb assumed a stake in the Life Sciences Tools & Services company Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc at Third Point LLC in the fourth quarter of FY25. As of Dec. 31, 2025, Loeb bought 50,000 shares in the company. Recent Key Events In February, Thermo Fisher Scientific’s Board approved a quarterly dividend of $0.47 per share, payable on April 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 13, 2026. The new dividend represents a 10% increase from the prior $0.43 payout.
